name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new physical model, analysis, or visualisation
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- A concise description of what you want to add. -->

## Scientific motivation

<!-- Why is this useful? What physical/cognitive phenomenon does it address?
     Please cite relevant literature if applicable. -->

## Proposed implementation

<!-- How you would implement this. Which module(s) would change?
     Rough pseudocode or equation is welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you've thought of, and why you prefer this one. -->

## References

<!-- Any papers, textbooks, or other resources relevant to this feature. -->
